message:
fix: prevent arrow labels and text from overlapping nodes

Three collision avoidance improvements:

1. WASM layout (layout.zig): edge labels placed by Graphviz are now
   checked against all node bounding boxes and pushed outside if they
   overlap (previously only label-vs-label was checked).

2. SDK (sdk.ts): resolveTextBoxOverlaps() nudges standalone text nodes
   that partially overlap box nodes after layout. Skips text fully
   contained inside a box (intentional content).

3. fromFile (sdk.ts): external arrows (not drawmode-generated) are now
   preserved as passthrough with original routing paths instead of being
   re-routed by Graphviz, which produced bad results on dense
   pre-positioned graphs.

Also makes BindingSchema focus/gap optional (types.ts) so fromFile
accepts newer Excalidraw formats.
